name: Mentor Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Howard's Jewelry Center in Mentor, OH buys, trades, and pawns jewelry, diamonds, gold, and silver for cash with free estimates and on-site master jeweler services.
description_long: Howard's Jewelry Center operates a jewelry retail and pawn shop located in Great Lakes Mall in Mentor, Ohio. The business functions primarily as a jewelry retailer selling engagement rings, wedding bands, diamonds, watches, and gift items across multiple price points. However, a significant portion of their business model is centered on collateral-based lending through jewelry and precious metals. The company explicitly advertises cash loans against jewelry, diamonds, gold, and silver, positioning themselves as a source of quick liquidity for consumers with valuable items. Howard's offers three transaction types for jewelry: direct sales, trade-ins toward new purchases, or pawning items as collateral for cash loans. The business provides on-site jewelry repair, custom design services, and employs a master jeweler with appointments available. Their Mentor location at 7850 Mentor Avenue operates extended mall hours (11 AM-8 PM Monday-Saturday, 11 AM-6 PM Sunday) and is relocating to a new standalone location in late April. The company markets heavily around the "get cash for your jewelry" value proposition, with prominent calls-to-action on their website stating "NEED CASH? TALK TO US!" and advertising "Get top dollar for your unwanted diamonds and fine jewelry" by using items as collateral. This dual retail-and-pawn model allows Howard's to serve both consumers seeking jewelry purchases and those needing emergency liquidity against valuable possessions. The free estimate offering removes barriers to learning loan amounts before committing.
pros: Free estimates for jewelry valuations with no obligation
On-site Master Jeweler available for repairs and custom design work
Extended mall hours (11 AM-8 PM weekdays) provide convenient access
Multiple transaction options: sell outright, trade-in, or pawn for loans
While-you-wait repair services available by appointment
Located inside Great Lakes Mall near food court for easy access
Accepts diamonds, gold, silver, and fine jewelry as collateral
cons: No information provided about interest rates, loan terms, or repayment periods
No details on how loan-to-value ratios are calculated or what percentage of item value is offered
Relocating to new location in late April (transition period uncertainty)
Limited online presence and no ability to get quotes remotely before visiting
No published information about fees, extension policies, or redemption procedures
best_for: Consumers needing quick cash against jewelry or precious metals they own
People seeking to sell unwanted diamonds and fine jewelry for immediate payment
Jewelry shoppers also interested in trade-in options for upgrades
Those needing jewelry repair or custom design services in the Mentor area
diagnosis: Howard's Jewelry Center is best suited for Mentor-area residents who own jewelry or diamonds and need quick cash against those items, or who are shopping for jewelry and may want to trade in existing pieces. The primary caveat is the complete absence of published information about loan terms, interest rates, loan-to-value percentages, and redemption procedures—all critical factors for evaluating any pawn transaction—making it essential to call (440) 951-5400 or visit in person to understand the actual cost and terms before committing to a loan.
services: Pawn loans using jewelry and diamonds as collateral
Direct sale of unwanted jewelry, diamonds, gold, and silver
Trade-in programs exchanging old jewelry for new purchases
Retail sales of engagement rings and wedding bands
